titles.title: I'll Worship Only At the Feet of Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I went to visit the shrine of plenty, But found its storerooms all filled with dust. I bowed at altars of gold and silver, But as I knelt there, they turned to rust

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I'll worship only at the feet of Jesus, His cup alone: My holy grail There'll be no others gods before Him Just Jesus only will never fail.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The call of fortune made me a pilgrim To journey to fame's promised heights But as I climbed, the promised faded And wind blew lonely all through the night.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just desert dust and empty shadow. All promises that turned to lies. The gods of earth fell and betrayed me You alone are Truth and Life
